sentence: Hoije nun stá friu, mas manhana bai a chober.
ipa: ˈojʒɨ ˈnũ ˈs̺ta ˈfɾju ˈmas̺ mɐˈɲanɐ ˈbaj ˈɐ tʃuˈβeɾ
gloss_en: Today it isn't cold, but tomorrow it's going to rain.
notes: Standard orthography with Sendinês reduction and nasal [ũ]; register per convencao1999.

sentence: Un quilo de queiso custa uito euros.
ipa: ˈũ ˈkilu ˈdɨ ˈkejz̺u ˈkus̺tɐ ˈujtu ˈewɾus̺
gloss_en: A kilo of cheese costs eight euros.
notes: The ⟨ei⟩ diphthong is retained in queiso->[ˈkejz̺u] (convencao1999).

sentence: Bou a l doutor l lhunes a la tarde.
ipa: ˈbow ˈɐ ˈl doˈwtoɾ ˈl ˈlunɨs̺ ˈɐ ˈlɐ ˈtaɾdɨ
gloss_en: I'm going to the doctor on Monday afternoon.
notes: Sendinês depalatalisation: ⟨lh⟩/initial-⟨l⟩->[l], lhunes->[ˈlunɨs̺] and article [l] (aditamento2000).

sentence: La mie família bibe alhá an Sendim.
ipa: ˈlɐ ˈmi fɐˈmilja ˈbiβɨ ɐˈla ˈɐ̃ ˈs̺endĩ
gloss_en: My family lives over there in Sendim.
notes: Sendinês depalatalisation ⟨lh⟩->[l] in alhá->[ɐˈla]; l- spelling is permitted for Sendim (aditamento2000).

sentence: Bai a la squierda i passa la punte.
ipa: ˈbaj ˈɐ ˈlɐ ˈs̺kiɾdɐ ˈi ˈpas̺ɐ ˈlɐ ˈpũtɨ
gloss_en: Go to the left and cross the bridge.
notes: Sendinês monophthongisation of the Leonese diphthong ⟨ie⟩->[i] in squierda->[ˈs̺kiɾdɐ] (ferreira1995).

sentence: Este pan mirandés stá mui buôno.
ipa: ˈes̺tɨ ˈpɐ̃ miɾɐˈndɛs̺ ˈs̺ta ˈmuj ˈbunu
gloss_en: This Mirandese bread is very good.
notes: Sendinês monophthongisation ⟨uô⟩->[u] in buôno->[ˈbunu] (ferreira1995).

sentence: Adonde stá la eigreija de l lhugar?
ipa: ɐˈdondɨ ˈs̺ta ˈlɐ eˈjɡɾejʒɐ ˈdɨ ˈl luˈɣaɾ
gloss_en: Where is the church of the village?
notes: Depalatalisation lhugar->[luˈɣaɾ] and article [l]; ⟨ei⟩ in eigreija (aditamento2000).

sentence: Quantos ninos hai na scuola?
ipa: ˈkɐ̃tus̺ ˈninus̺ ˈaj ˈnɐ ˈs̺kulɐ
gloss_en: How many children are there at the school?
notes: Sendinês monophthongisation ⟨uo⟩->[u] in scuola->[ˈs̺kulɐ] (ferreira1995).

sentence: Se chobir manhana, nun bamos a la tiêrra.
ipa: ˈs̺ɨ tʃuˈβiɾ mɐˈɲanɐ ˈnũ ˈbamus̺ ˈɐ ˈlɐ ˈtirɐ
gloss_en: If it rains tomorrow, we won't go to the fields.
notes: Sendinês monophthongisation ⟨iê⟩->[i] in tiêrra->[ˈtirɐ] with trill /r/ (ferreira1995).

sentence: Onte mercéi bino i queiso na tenda.
ipa: ˈõtɨ mɨˈɾsɛi ˈbinu ˈi ˈkejz̺u ˈnɐ ˈtendɐ
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought wine and cheese at the shop.
notes: Past-tense register; the ⟨ei⟩ diphthong in queiso, mercéi (convencao1999).

sentence: Para l anho que ben bou a Miranda.
ipa: ˈpaɾɐ ˈl ˈaɲu ˈkɨ ˈbẽ ˈbow ˈɐ miˈɾandɐ
gloss_en: Next year I'm going to Miranda.
notes: Nasal monophthong ben->[ˈbẽ]; Sendinês article [l] (convencao1999).

sentence: Chamou-me l miu armano pul telifone.
ipa: ˈtʃamow ˈmɨ ˈl ˈmju ɐˈɾmanu ˈpul tɨliˈfonɨ
gloss_en: My brother phoned me.
notes: Sendinês article/possessive [l] in 'l miu armano'; depalatalising context (aditamento2000).

sentence: Buonos dies, cumo stás? Stou bien, oubrigado.
ipa: ˈbunus̺ ˈdis̺ ˈkumu ˈs̺tas̺ ˈs̺tow ˈbĩ owbɾiˈɣadu
gloss_en: Good morning, how are you? I'm well, thank you.
notes: Greeting formulae; ⟨ou⟩ retained in stou->[ˈs̺tow] (convencao1999).

sentence: Quien nun trabalha, nun cume.
ipa: ˈkĩ ˈnũ tɾɐˈβalɐ ˈnũ ˈkumɨ
gloss_en: He who doesn't work, doesn't eat.
notes: Proverb register; Sendinês depalatalisation ⟨lh⟩->[l] in trabalha->[tɾɐˈβalɐ] (ferreira1995).

sentence: La raposa cuôrre pula carreira arriba.
ipa: ˈlɐ rɐˈpoz̺ɐ ˈkurɨ ˈpulɐ kɐˈrejɾɐ ɐˈriβɐ
gloss_en: The fox runs up the track.
notes: Sendinês monophthongisation ⟨uô⟩->[u] in cuôrre->[ˈkurɨ]; trill /r/ in carreira (ferreira1995).

sentence: Bi ua streilha subre l castielho.
ipa: ˈbi ˈwa ˈs̺tɾejlɐ ˈs̺ubɾɨ ˈl kɐˈs̺tilu
gloss_en: I saw a star above the castle.
notes: Sendinês monophthongisation ⟨ie⟩->[i] in castielho->[kɐˈs̺tilu]; ⟨ei⟩ in streilha with ⟨lh⟩->[l] (ferreira1995).

sentence: L sol sal por trás de l muôlino.
ipa: ˈl ˈs̺ol ˈs̺al ˈpoɾ ˈtɾas̺ ˈdɨ ˈl muˈlinu
gloss_en: The sun sets behind the mill.
notes: Sendinês monophthongisation ⟨uô⟩->[u] in muôlino->[muˈlinu]; coda ⟨l⟩ in sol, sal (ferreira1995).

sentence: La mulhier apanha las fuolhas de l castanheiro.
ipa: ˈlɐ muˈliɾ ɐˈpaɲɐ ˈlas̺ ˈfulɐs̺ ˈdɨ ˈl kɐs̺tɐˈɲejɾu
gloss_en: The woman gathers the leaves of the chestnut tree.
notes: Depalatalisation ⟨lh⟩->[l] in mulhier, fuolhas, but ⟨nh⟩->[ɲ] preserved in apanha (aditamento2000).

sentence: La puôrta de l huôrto stá alhá abierta.
ipa: ˈlɐ ˈpuɾtɐ ˈdɨ ˈl ˈuɾtu ˈs̺ta ɐˈla ɐˈβiɾtɐ
gloss_en: The door of the vegetable garden is open over there.
notes: Sendinês monophthongisation ⟨uô⟩->[u] in puôrta, huôrto; depalatalisation alhá->[ɐˈla] (ferreira1995).

sentence: L campo stá cheno de flores i de yerba.
ipa: ˈl ˈkɐ̃pu ˈs̺ta ˈtʃenu ˈdɨ ˈfloɾɨs̺ ˈi ˈdɨ ˈjeɾbɐ
gloss_en: The field is full of flowers and grass.
notes: Nasal ⟨an⟩->[ɐ̃] in campo; the ⟨ye⟩ onset in yerba (convencao1999).
